street.description: The street part of the address including street number and other similar information required to locate the address.

postalCode.description: The postal code as defined for the address' country.

Annotation.description: The type/role a user can have.

AttachmentType.description: The type of attachment for a test record.

phone.description: The contact's phone number if any.

comment.description: An optional comment about the contact.

soldTo.description: Optional reference to the customer entity in SAP.

description.description: An optional description for the attachment.

customerId.description: The ID of the customer this test grouping belongs to.

siteId.description: The ID of the site this test grouping belongs to. If unspecified, this is inferred from the authenticated user.

comments.description: Optional comments about this test record.

testDate.description: The date the test was performed.

readerSerialNumber.description: Optionally the serial number of the reader used for the test.

route.description: Optionally an identifier for the route this test was made on.

comments.description: Optional comments about this test record.

readerData.description: Optionally, the raw bits returned by the reader to get this test result.

testTypeId.description: The ID for the type of this test.

userId.description: The ID of the user who performed the test.

siteId.description: The ID of the site this test record belongs to. If unspecified, this is inferred from the authenticated user.

substances.description: The levels of the individual substances in this test.

customerId.description: The ID of the customer this test record belongs to.

cassetteId.description: Cartridge Id - the id scanned from QR

shipTo.description: Optional reference to site entity in SAP.

customerId.description: The ID of the customer this site belongs to.

termsText.description: The terms for that are being presented to the user

released.description: Boolean indicating if it has been released

level.description: The level measured for this substance in the test.

readerResultReference.description: Optional information that points to the data about the measurement of this particular substance in the raw test result.

negativeValue.description: Negative threshold as part of the judging policy. Values between this and the positive value are defined as "weak positive".

positiveValue.description: Positive threshold as part of the judging policy. Values between the negative value and this are defined as "weak positive".

substances.description: The substances measured with this test type.

temperature.description: Nullable temperature. This is used for some test to determine settings.

incubationTime.description: Nullable incubation time. This is used for some test to determine settings.

qrIdString.description: An id to help identify what test this is.

username.description:
User identifier in MilkSafe (it does not have to be an email address).
Must match Salesforce User ID for customer admin roles.

firstName.description: Optionally the first name of the user if this is a person.

lastName.description: Optionally the last name of the user if this is a person.

comment.description: An optional comment about the user.

password.description:
Required for Root and Operator users. Must not be specified for site administrators unless the external user flag is false.
If specified when updating existing users their password will be changed to this value.

testDate.description: The date the verification was performed.

comments.description: Optional comments about this verification record.

readerData.description: Optionally, the raw bits returned by the reader to get this verification result.

testTypeId.description: The ID for the type of this test.

substances.description: The levels of the individual substances in this verification.

appVersion.description: Software version of the app, not used on desktop reader

level.description: The level measured for this substance in the verification.

readerResultReference.description: Optional information that points to the data about the measurement of this particular substance in the raw verification result.

intensity.description: The intensity for this substance in the test.

CreateVerificationRequestVerificationSub.description: A measurement of a substance in a verification record.

CustomerType.description: The type/role a user can have.

GroupedTestResult.description: The result/outcome of a test flow. Negative means "passed", and positive "rejected".

JudgeType.description: The judge type used to determine the result of a test.

JudgingDirection.description: The judging direction used to determine the result for a test.

negativeValue.description: Negative threshold override, this will override the value defined in the test type

positiveValue.description: Positive threshold override, this will override the value defined in the test type

negativeValue.description: Negative threshold override, this will override the value defined in the testtype

positiveValue.description: Positive threshold override, this will override the value defined in the testtype

TestRecordTemperatureVerification.description: A test record temperature used only in verification

TestResult.description: The result/outcome of a test. Negative means "passed", and positive "rejected".

TestTypeCategory.description: The category of the test. This is for identifying the type of test.

readerIndex.description: The array index for the values for this substance in the data returned by the reader.

soldTo.description: Optional reference to the customer entity in SAP.

shipTo.description: Optional reference to site entity in SAP.

customerId.description: The ID of the customer this site belongs to.

availableTestTypes.description: The test types applicable for this site.

testTypeId.description: The ID of the test type.

negativeValue.description: Negative threshold as part of the judging policy. Values between this and the positive value are defined as "weak positive".

positiveValue.description: Positive threshold as part of the judging policy. Values between the negative value and this are defined as "weak positive".

substances.description: The substances measured with this test type.

temperature.description: Nullable temperature. This is used for some test to determine settings.

incubationTime.description: Nullable incubation time. This is used for some test to determine settings.

qrIdString.description: An id to help identify what test this is.

username.description:
User identifier in MilkSafe (it does not have to be an email address).
Must match Salesforce User ID for customer admin roles.

firstName.description: Optionally the first name of the user if this is a person.

lastName.description: Optionally the last name of the user if this is a person.

comment.description: An optional comment about the user.

password.description:
Required for Root and Operator users. Must not be specified for site administrators unless the external user flag is false.
If specified when updating existing users their password will be changed to this value.

acceptedTerms.description: The different terms the user has accepted

UserType.description: The type/role a user can have.

testDate.description: The date the verification was performed.

comments.description: Optional comments about this verification record.

readerData.description: Optionally, the raw bits returned by the reader to get this verification result.

testTypeId.description: The ID for the type of this test.

userId.description: The ID of the user who performed the test.

siteId.description: The ID of the site this verification record belongs to.

substances.description: The levels of the individual substances in this verification.

customerId.description: The ID of the customer this test record belongs to.

testsSinceLastVerification.description: Number of tests since last verification.

appVersion.description: Software version of the app, not used on desktop reader

deviceHealthId.description: Id of the device health this verification belongs to

VerificationDTO.description: An instance of a specific test type.

Wgs84Point.description: Represents a geolocation in the WGS84 reference system (quite commonly used, e.g. by Google Maps).

Bearer.description: Please enter into field the word 'Bearer' following by space and JWT
Bearer.name: Authorization
